summary.key_theme: 市場對 R2 SUV 的發布與 TD Cowen 的評級調升持樂觀態度，同時公司在 AI 與晶片技術的研發布局被視為股價重估的關鍵催化劑。

bullish.title: What's Going On With Rivian Stock Monday — Rivian (RIVN) stock is surging Monday following a TD Cowen upgrade and the public debut of the R2 SUV at SXSW.
bullish.reason: TD Cowen 的評級調升與 R2 SUV 在 SXSW 的公開亮相直接推動了股價上漲，這是近期最強勁的利多訊號。

bullish.title: Rivian: Why It's Finally Time To Buy (Rating Upgrade) — Rivian Automotive's efforts to create in-house chips and agentic AI software should underpin a stock repricing.
bullish.reason: 公司在自研晶片與 AI 軟體方面的投入，被分析師視為長期價值重估的核心，有助於提升市場對其技術護城河的信心。

bullish.title: Why TD Cowen Turned Bullish on Rivian Automotive (RIVN) Ahead of the R2 Launch
bullish.reason: 詳細解釋了 TD Cowen 看好 R2 產品線的潛力，強化了市場對 Rivian 未來銷量成長的預期。

bullish.title: RJ Scaringe Says He's Betting On Industrial Robots Instead Of Ones That Can Do Cartwheels As Rivian Spinoff Secures $500 Million Funding
bullish.reason: Rivian 拆分出的 Mind Robotics 獲得 5 億美元融資，顯示公司生態系具備資本吸引力，雖非核心業務，但對品牌形象有正面助益。

bearish.title: Rivian: Return To Growth In 2026 — Rivian (RIVN) Q4â€™25: gross margins hit 9% as deliveries fell 31% post EV tax credit.
bearish.reason: 儘管毛利率改善至 9%，但交付量因電動車稅收抵免政策影響而下滑 31%，顯示需求端仍面臨政策敏感性挑戰。

bearish.title: Is It Time To Reassess Rivian (RIVN) After Recent Share Price Weakness
bearish.reason: 針對近期股價疲軟進行重新評估，反映出市場對於公司成長動能是否能持續的擔憂，屬於防禦性觀點。

neutral.title: Rivian Automotive Option Alert: Apr 17 $18 Calls Sweep (8) near the Ask: 2721 @ $0.4 vs 6881 OI; Earnings 5/5 After Close [est] Ref=$15.95
neutral.reason: 此為期權市場的資金流動數據，反映投資人對 5 月財報前的避險或投機行為，對股價本身無直接基本面影響。
